title: WF Graham Large Print Criss Cross Puzzle Books for Adults and Teens - Pack of 4 Crossword Activity Book Set with over 200 Puzzles Each
features: [Over 800 Unique Puzzles in Total] - Each Criss Cross puzzle book in this set of 4 contains a completely different set of 200 puzzles, meaning this pack contains more than 800 unique criss crosswords in total - plenty to keep you occupied!
[Word Fit Puzzles] - Fit the given words into the grid to complete the criss-cross puzzles in each adult activity book. There are 200 exciting puzzles to complete in each book!
[Large Print Puzzle Books] - These puzzle books are printed in a large print typeface, so older people or those with certain visual impairments can enjoy completing them
[Variety of Themes] - Each puzzle has a fun theme, such as Capital Cities, Time Travel and the Letter "W", with a variety of word lengths. Solutions can be found at the back of each book
[Compact and Environmentally Friendly] - These books are approximately 24x18x1cm each, and are made with eco-friendly recycled paper. They are also fully recyclable
description: WF Graham Large Print Criss Cross Puzzle Books for Adults and Teens - Crossword Activity Book Pack of 4 with over 200 Puzzles Each. Over 800 puzzles in total. Each Criss Cross puzzle book contains 200 puzzles, meaning this set of 4 contains more than 800 unique crosswords in total - plenty to keep you occupied for a while! Word Fit Puzzles. Fit the given words into the grid to complete the criss-cross puzzles in each adult activity crossword book. There are 200 exciting puzzles to complete in each book! Large Print Puzzle Books. These puzzle books are printed in a large print typeface, so older people or those with certain visual impairments can enjoy completing them. Variety of Themes. Each puzzle in these word puzzles for adults has a fun theme, such as Capital Cities, Time Travel and the Letter "W", with a variety of word lengths. Solutions can be found at the back of each book. Compact and Environmentally Friendly. These books are approximately 24x18x1cm each, and are made with eco-friendly recycled paper. They are also fully recyclable. One of each colour book (pink, green, blue and orange) supplied.
